observation: Creator capsule routes now cover static surfaces, prompt DNA, motion storyboard, contact-sheet QA, social card, p5 creative-coding probes, Remotion timeline code, and Manim explainer stubs. Creators still need a safe live-visual-network handoff for TouchDesigner/twozero before any local port, screenshot, .tox/.toe export, raw media, or live TD connection enters the repo.
population: creator capsule frontier-adapter mutations for externally-rendered visual workflows
selection_pressure: help a creator turn one capsule into an executable renderer or live-tool handoff faster while preserving memory, proof, public boundary, and minimal DASH core size

candidates.mutation: Route the capsule into a TouchDesigner/twozero topology handoff with local-operator safety checks and generated ignored proof artifacts.
candidates.phenotype: JSON TouchDesigner adapter contract plus fixed-canvas proof card and generated .artifacts topology/safety files
candidates.risk: Could become unsafe automation if the check opens ports, connects to an unverified TD process, captures screenshots, or commits .tox/.toe exports instead of retaining only a public-safe handoff.

candidates.mutation: Route the capsule into a browser demo surface with screenshot QA and rollback notes.
candidates.phenotype: Single HTML demo plus browser proof and deploy checklist
candidates.risk: Can become another static board unless it has a real deploy or interaction path.

candidates.mutation: Route the capsule into a small printable PDF zine for creator process notes.
candidates.phenotype: Multi-panel HTML/PDF proof using existing print path
candidates.risk: May duplicate the poster and one-pager paths unless a distinct remix job is proven.

candidates.mutation: Route the repo-local creator skill package into a reviewed external release checklist with install smoke, versioning, and rollback.
candidates.phenotype: Release contract and smoke script pending a reviewed registry target
candidates.risk: Could accidentally sync an unreviewed skill into live agents or publish private workflow assumptions.

retention: Retain creator-touchdesigner-tox-route as the public-safe bridge from capsule memory to an external TouchDesigner/twozero live-network handoff: JSON contract, generated ignored topology/safety artifacts, fixed-canvas proof card, and machine gate. Keep older winners in retained_routes so the active candidate list stays focused on 3-5 current mutations without losing regression coverage.
